label: weapons_showdown_1_saloon_entry
qwen: photograph of a weathered cowboy in a long brown duster coat and wide-brimmed hat pushing through the swinging double doors of an old west saloon, a holstered six-shooter visible at the hip, lantern light spilling out from inside revealing card players and a bartender, dust drifting in shafts of evening light
video: the cowboy steps inside and the swinging doors thump back and forth behind him, all conversation in the saloon stops, every face turns toward him, audio is the doors creaking, a piano playing then suddenly stopping mid-chord, boots on wooden floorboards, complete silence

label: weapons_showdown_2_card_table
video: the cowboy slowly walks to a green felt card table where a tense game of poker is in progress, the gun belt visible at his side, players watch warily as he sets a coin on the edge of the table, audio is boots, coin clinking on wood, leather creaking, a single match being struck somewhere

label: weapons_showdown_3_main_street
video: the cowboy walks back out of the saloon into the empty dusty main street at high noon, sun glaring down, a tumbleweed rolling past, his hand hovering near but not touching the holstered revolver, audio is wind blowing, jingling spurs, the saloon doors thumping shut behind him, a distant church bell

label: weapons_showdown_4_standoff
video: an opposing figure has appeared at the far end of the street, both stand motionless facing each other across the dust, hands hovering, the camera pushes in slowly on the cowboy's eyes narrowing under the hat brim, audio is the iconic Morricone whistle theme rising, wind, jingling spurs, no shots fired

label: weapons_showdown_5_walk_away
video: the cowboy slowly raises his hand from the holster and tips the brim of his hat to the opposing figure, then turns and walks back the way he came, the opposing figure does the same in the opposite direction, audio is a deep voice intoning: today ain't the day, the Morricone whistle resolves, jingling spurs fading
